programme.desc: Tony traffade Tiana på Facebook for två år sen och blir betagen av henne. Men varningsflaggor gjorde att han vande sig till Nev och Kamie for att få hjalp. Nar saker och ting borjar klarna hoppas Nev och Kamie kunna ge Tony svar.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Shawny har nyligen separerat från sin make. Nev och Max hjalper henne att ta reda på mer om hennes nya karlek, men det blir intressant nar de upptacker att Shawny kan ha hemligheter sjalv.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Verktygen ar heta men tavlingen fullkomligt brinner nar konstnarerna kampar om kontrollen i Flash Challenge. Kampen hettar till om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Marie alskar tantramassagen som Antoine, hennes pojkvan sen fem år, ger henne. Men på sistone har Marie borjat misstanka att Antoine masserar fler kvinnor, efter att ha borjat erbjuda tjansten Menage à Trois.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Efter tre år tillsammans planerar Sasha och Citi sin framtid, och funderar på att skaffa barn ihop. Men nyligen bad Citi Sasha att borja med preventivmedel igen, vilket fick Sacha att undra om Citi planerar en framtid med någon annan.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.desc: Dukar som har tatuerats två gånger i tavlingen återvander for att mota sina tatuerare som kampar for upprattelse. Emily Elegado, Angel, Bubba och Jim återvander.

programme.title: Ink Master: Redemption
programme.desc: Tatuerarna måste overtraffa Ink Masters vinnare for att få en chans till upprattelse. Nick DAngelo, Ryan Eternal, Jason Clay Dunn och Steve Tefft återvander.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt av Ridiculousness tar sig Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal an vågorna i Forsfara, kastar ut i Freestylefiske och tar en tugga med Dåraktiga dippare.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt av Ridiculousness Rob blir Steelo och gasten Nina Agdal lite smutsiga i Lerkanehalka, traffar barn med Skitiga små munnar och lar sig hur man gor två saker samtidigt av Kombosportfånar.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt Ridiculousness ska Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal få svårt att hålla i sig i Grepphalka, slå sonder lampor i Lampkross och hoppa hogt i Fallskarmsoverraskning.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett rykande farskt Ridiculousness ska Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal flyga hogt i Slangfard, stå i backen i Sista åket och utmarka sig på gymmet i Trana individuellt.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt Ridiculousness ska Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal visa upp sin dåliga pricksakerhet i Långt från målet, uppleva nederlag i Sportsorg och vanda sig om nar Faran smyger fram.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness skyddar Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Nina Agdal sina halsar från Fordonstorklinor, tar sikte i den nya upprorande leken Barn, boll, small och packar upp en korg med kaos i Picknickfaror.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Nu ska det avgoras! Topptrion avtacker sina mastertatueringar och en overraskningsjury bestående av tidigare vinnare okar pressen. En tatuerare vinner 250 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: 16 nya tatuerare tavlar och delas in i två lag beroende på hur lange de har tatuerat. Tatuerarna måste kampa for en plats i laget. Kampen om 250 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master borjar.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness avslojar Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood faran med dorroppningar i Dorrdaskad innan de ger sig ut på boljan blå i Kryss och hyss och avslutar med några mastare på forkladnad i Stadskamouflage.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness står Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino emot vinden i Aggressiv luft, kampar med atpinnar i Fummelpinnar och visar upp sina udda talanger i Fardighet ar fardighet.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I kvallen avsnitt av Ridiculousness drabbas Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino av skador med farforaldrar i Barnbarnsskada, får den skona stamningen sabbad av Stamningssankare och har lite sydstatskul i Lantisavslappning.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I kvallens avsnitt av Ridiculousness riskerar Rob, Steelo och Karrueche Tran att somna i Blottlagda tupplurar, hittar nya anvandningsområden forutom hockey for sina Nyttoklubbor och får stryk ovanifrån i Takattacker.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness slår Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino i skallen i Ingen hojdbedomning, tar examen i multitasking på Simultankapacitets-universitet och ser barn bli bortslapade i Hundar med barnslap.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness blir Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino lite val tavlingsinriktade nar det ska hjulas i Oavsiktlig hjulningsskada, bevittnar tunnelbanekaos i Galentåg och benar ut ett och annat med Skelettpolare.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Lhumoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourdhui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche dhumour unique à lachat dantiquites. De son côte, Nancy, mannequin et presentatrice tele, sait aussi marchander et elle est très competitive ! Le couple est accompagne par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mysterieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: “Happiness is an angel with a serious face.” These words by the Italian painter Amadeo Modgliani define to perfection the portraits which made him famous… He reinvented the icon, with his oval faces, his elongated necks and lapis-lazuli eyes which are strangely expressive even when robbed of substance. You will be able to appreciate the simplicity of his figures, the restraint in his lines and colours, especially when you admire “The Woman with the Blue Eyes” or the “Portrait of Anna Zborowska”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Repute pour etre le createur de la peinture à l’huile, le peintre flamand Jan van Eyck (1390-1441) est un artiste majeur du 15ème siècle. Il est considere comme etant le fondateur du portrait occidental qu’il a pratique très meticuleusement. Regardez de près la fameux « Portrait d’Arnolfini » expose à la Galerie Nationale de Londres, le miroir circulaire au fond de la pièce montre le reflet de l’artiste. « La vierge du chancelier Rolin » expose au Louvre, quant à elle montre une image dans laquelle trois arcs s’ouvrent sur un paysage fluvial.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Lusine Menier à Noisiel fut entre 1870 et 1914 la plus grande chocolaterie du monde. Mais ce fut aussi et surtout une usine pionnière en matière dinnovation architecturale. Son architecture de fer puis de beton voulait symboliser la puissance et la modernite de lentreprise. Ses trois bâtiments majeurs, le moulin Saulnier, la première construction à charpente entièrement metallique du monde, la Halle Eiffel et la Cathedrale racontent à leur manière lâge dor de larchitecture industrielle.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entouree de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingredients pour creer un mythe sont tous reunis. Beneficiant d’un accès complet et sans precedent aux tresors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes preferes du monde et la collection riche et unique du musee. Decouvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand ecran pendant que quelques invites y compris les conservateurs de renommee mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interpretations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Dans la seconde moitie du 19ème siècle, Edouard Manet (1832-1883) demontre une grande originalite dans ses peintures à representation historique et ses portraits representant des figures connues, comme le romancier Zola et le poète Mallarme. Meme s’il n’est pas reconnu comme etant le premier impressionniste, sa place de leader dans l’histoire de l’art se doit d’etre souligne. Les scandales provoques en 1863 par « Le Dejeuner sur l’herbe » ou « Olympia » tout deux exposes au Musee dOrsay marque le debut de la peinture moderne.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous rendons dans la banlieue Sud de Paris. C’est dans un quartier tranquille que l’artiste Elias Crespin se rend chaque matin pour rejoindre son studio. L’artiste d’origine venezuelienne, y a etabli ses quartiers depuis près de 5 ans et y façonnent ses creations un peu particulières. Ses sculptures sont composees de figures geometriques simples, des lignes, triangles, carres ou cercles, qui flottent dans l’espace suspendus à des fils presque invisibles.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Karel Appel’s father forced him to take over the hairdressing business, but Karel only wanted one thing: to become a painter. And he did: A great master ahead of his time, a world famous painter even. In 1949, when he was still unknown and penniless, he made "Child, Church, Animal". Actually nothing is known about the construction of this painting. Not more than you can discover at first sight. To find out more, we have to take a closer look at the work using a microscope. It seems as if the work consists of several layers.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: It was not until he was 27 that Vincent van Gogh decided to become a fulltime artist. And yet, in the ten years until his death he made more than 900 paintings. His influence on painting has been enormous. His use of color and compositions have inspired generations after him. The team of Masterpiece examines the paintings and finds everything between the layers. And if they are lucky, they might discover something special. We know a lot about Van Gogh’s life through correspondence with his brother. But exactly what he looked like remains a mystery. If we strip the self-portrait of the characteristic lines, we have a change to look this masterpainter in the eye….

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous irons à la rencontre de l’artiste Erik Desmazières. Il est l’un des artistes graveurs les plus connus en France, et il est expose à travers le monde. Il a apporte à cette discipline un peu desuète, une forme de modernite, grâce à ses paysages fantastiques imbibes de science-fiction remarques tout de suite par les collectionneurs. Membre de l’Academie Française des Beaux-Arts depuis 2008, Erik Desmazières s’est tourne ces dernières annees vers des paysages realistes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: 200 years after it opened and a century after acquiring its first Van Gogh works, the National Gallery hosted the largest Van Gogh exhibition ever held in the UK (September 14, 2024 to January 19, 2025). The exhibition was a huge success, unanimously praised by the press, and tickets sold out quickly, making this film the only way to see what Forbes called a “once-in-a-lifetime exhibition.”Discover the passion that drove one of the worlds most beloved artists to revolutionize art. Van Gogh: Poets and Lovers rewrites history and celebrates Van Goghs genius without exploiting his suffering, allowing audiences to truly understand this iconic artist in a whole new way...

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Pierre Terrasson, photographer. He is considered the rock, punk and new wave photographer of the 1980s, but not only. He started to get interested in photography at the age of 14-15 with his friends. He will tell us how he became a photographer and talk about his life, his career, and what made him famous.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Modern Japanese Prints, waves of revival to the Fondation Custodia
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the "Waves of revival" exhibition about 20th century Japanese art at the Fondation Custodia in Paris. You will discover the works of artists such as Kanae Yamamoto, a Japanese artist who was inspired by French art when he arrived in France. But we will also present works with very Japanese influences such as the prints of Hashiguchi Goyo.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Mondrian is one of the greatest innovators of Modern art. He started out as a landscape painter, but became world famous as a painter of abstract works. Mondrian tried to depict the world behind the visible world. He wanted to create "universal

programme.title: Bubble residence!
programme.desc: Discover the daily life of three young illustrators and comic book authors at the authors house in Angouleme in France.

programme.title: Taxidermy at work
programme.desc: Practice used since the Renaissance to fill the curiosity cabinets, taxidermy became obsolete in the 20th century. It owes its rehabilitation contemporary artists in the 90s crossed Portraits of three artists who use this practice in their works.

programme.title: Hôtel de Crillon - The Renaissance of a Paris landmark
programme.desc: At the bottom of the Champs-Élysees is one of the most luxurious hotels in the world: the Hôtel de Crillon. After lavish refurbishment, this 300-year old monument recently received "Palace" status.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musee d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Between 1883 and 1926 Claude Monet lived in a house at Giverny where he created a flower garden and a water garden, which provided the inspiration for his series of paintings known as the “Water Lilies”. The “Water-Lily Pond” portrays this garden, with its water lilies and the Japanese bridge in the background. In the series of eight large canvases on the theme, housed in the Musee de l’Orangerie in Paris, Monet introduces variations in light according to the hour of the day.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Georges Seurat. You will discover his labour with « Ile de France » landscape, Study for « a Sunday afternoon at the grande jatte », Study for « La grande jatte ».

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui etait Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie dune veritable icône, decouvrez son art et la verite qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementee. La combinaison dinterviews, de commentaires et dune exploration detaillee de lart de Kahlo, offre un tresor de couleurs et un festin de vitalite. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilegie à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa creativite febrile, sa resilience et sa soif inegalee pour la vie.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Leader of the School of Pont-Aven, Paul Gauguin, the most exotic of French artists, paved the way for modern painting. There were two main themes which marked his work: Brittany and Tahiti. A rebel, he rejected copying reality in favour of exploring more delicate painting techniques. You will discover here the most important milestones in his work: from “Four Breton Girls” to “Tahitian Women on the Beach”, by way of the surprising “Self Portrait with Yellow Christ”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Originaire de la ville de Grasse dans le sud de la France, Jean-Honore Fragonard est le peintre français le plus emblematique du 18ème siècle. Il a etudie à l’academie française à Rome mais à choisi de devenir libre dans son travail, preferant effectuer des commissions privees, dont certaines ont eu du succès comme « La chemise enlevee » expose au Louvre. « Fanciful Figure » expose au Louvre-Lens quant à elle demontre un style très moderne et original. L’un de ses chefs-d’oeuvre est sans aucun doute le tableau « Le Boulon », appartenant aujourd’hui à la collection du Louvre à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Architecte et urbaniste, Kenzo Tange est lun des architectes les plus influents de sa generation; il a initie le Japon à larchitecture moderne, decouverte dans le travail des maîtres. Il fut, en 1987, le premier Japonais à recevoir le prix Pritzker, la plus haute distinction mondiale en architecture. Il faut remonter à la defaite du Japon après la deuxième guerre mondiale et aux annees qui ont suivi : loccupation du Japon par les Americains, son absence de la scène internationale, sa lente reconstruction economique pour comprendre la vraie origine des 2 gymnases olympiques construits par Kenzo Tange pour les Jeux Olympiques de 1964. Il est rare quun bâtiment incarne autant dambitions : celles dun architecte et dune equipe de 25 jeunes architectes et urbanistes, celles dune ville, celles dun pays decide à redevenir une puissance mondiale.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », ecrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Theo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est base ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musee Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visite le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en creant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la decouverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Ne à Aix-en-Provence dans le Sud de la France, Paul Cezanne (1839-1906) etait un grand peintre français lors de la deuxième moitie du 19ème siècle. Artiste de base impressionniste, il initie le post-impressionnisme et le cubisme à travers ses oeuvres. Dans ses natures mortes et ses « Baigneurs », il innove grâce aux formes geometriques, permettant d’influencer les artistes cubistes qui le succèdent. Il a choisi de peindre la « Montagne Sainte-Victoire » une vingtaine de fois. Remarquez la magnifique simplicite de l’oeuvre « Nature morte aux pommes et aux oranges » ou la concentration illustre dans « Les Joueurs de cartes » tout deux exposes au Musee dOrsay.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Bubble residence!
programme.desc: Discover the daily life of three young illustrators and comic book authors at the authors house in Angouleme in France.

programme.title: Taxidermy at work
programme.desc: Practice used since the Renaissance to fill the curiosity cabinets, taxidermy became obsolete in the 20th century. It owes its rehabilitation contemporary artists in the 90s crossed Portraits of three artists who use this practice in their works.

programme.title: Hôtel de Crillon - The Renaissance of a Paris landmark
programme.desc: At the bottom of the Champs-Élysees is one of the most luxurious hotels in the world: the Hôtel de Crillon. After lavish refurbishment, this 300-year old monument recently received "Palace" status.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: François Boucq draws from morning to night in his studio, alone, as if he wanted to be more closely involved with his characters, moving from the savagery of the American West to the diplomacy of the Vatican, from the urban jungle to the news of the daily press. He has been drawing for 40 years with realism, with a precise and detailed line, a graphic finesse that makes him one of the undisputed masters of todays comics.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Lurent Vu, photo reporter. He was born in Nice in 1977, and moved to Paris to study photography. During this period he did an internship at Studio Harcourt, then at Sipa Press, where he still works. He has a taste for portraiture, but also for reportage and journalism.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Picasso. Blue and Pink" at the Musee dOrsay in Paris. This is an exceptional event because it is the first exhibition in France dedicated to the artists blue and pink period. This exhibition brings together about 300 works by the artist during this period from 1900 to 1906, including "Woman with a Fan". During this period of his life, Picasso was between 18 and 25 years old and began to assert his artistic identity.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Rembrandt van Rijn a realise ce tableau à lâge de 24 ans. Il sagit dun tableau incroyablement complexe dans lequel tout son talent est reuni : Leffet enchanteur entre lesquisse et le petit detail. Mais aussi lexpression de tous les differents materiaux tels que le velours, le metal, le corail rouge et la roche. Michel van de Laar, membre de lequipe, a restaure des œuvres de Rembrandt dans le passe et a decouvert que la peinture cachait quelque chose de special : Un cheveu de Rembrandt. Lors de la reconstruction, un cheveu sera egalement remis en place. Et pas nimporte quel cheveu : une recherche passionnante mène à un descendant de Rembrandt.

programme.title: A night in Orsay with Charles Berling
programme.desc: The Musee d’Orsay not only houses the largest collection of impressionist and post-impressionist masterpieces in the world, but the building itself is impressive. What about visiting it alone at night with a theatrical guide?

programme.title: Backlight : NFT Mania
programme.desc: NFTs are non-fungible tokens, a type of digital property deeds that makes virtual images negotiable. For some time now, NFTs have been the expensive new toys of often young, anonymous collectors with a lot of cryptocurrency.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or rediscover the masterpieces by Gustave Moreau (1826-1898) on display at the Musee dOrsay, the Gustave Moreau Museum in Paris...

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-François Millet. You will discover his labour with Naked woman sleeping, Two bathers or The church at greville.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Theodore Gericault. You will discover his labour with An Officer of the Imperial horse guards, Heroic landscape with fisherman or The Horse race.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Coconut milk is easy to cook, and can be used with a wide range of ingredients, from stews and soups to sweet recipes.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Pour les paresseux et tous ceux qui n’ont pas le temps, Luana Belmondo propose deux petites recettes simples et efficaces. Decouvrez son pain à lail et au fromage, et ses spaghettis à lail.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports

programme.title: Audio Advice

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Root to Rise: Balance, Twist, Hamstrings
programme.desc: Learn to stay open, no matter what happens, with the Root to Rise sequence. This practice provides an opportunity to explore your capacity for receiving energy, while building strength and confidence. When you maintain a connection to grounded energy, you can heighten your ability to stay present in every moment.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the coaches guide you through a workout focused on strengthening the lower body. The warm-up is thorough, targeting the neck, shoulders, hips, knees, and ankles with controlled movements. Mobility and breathing are key to prevent injuries. The vibe is fun, the pace is clear, and each move is broken down step by step. Perfect to start your day—or get moving anytime—alone or with the family.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Create Your Calm: A Grounding Flow for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Cultivate a sense of peace and stability with the Create Your Calm sequence. This restorative flow stays low to allow for a deeper connection to the earth and its grounding energy. Connect with your heart more completely and welcome a softer awareness with this gentle practice.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce troisième jour de competition, cest Vincent qui va donner de la voix. À 38 ans, ce Namurois au look soigne de la tete aux pieds travaille comme directeur artistique dans une agence de publicite. La creativite et les tendances, ça le connaît ! Vincent est un amateur de decoration minimaliste et quand il redecore, il a sa propre technique.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. Theyll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. Theyll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. Forests cover 45% of the territory. Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes off to discover these resources with those whose job it is to protect them. He takes a look at the ecological balance sheet of the world’s eighth-largest economic power.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. programme.desc: Cet episode de "Fais ton sport à la maison" est une seance douce axee sur la mobilite et le bien-etre du haut du corps. Les exercices se concentrent sur les twists et les etirements lateraux, favorisant la mobilite de la colonne et la detente musculaire. Cette seance est ideale pour les sportifs ayant des courbatures ou pour ceux cherchant à ameliorer leur souplesse et reduire les tensions. Accessible à tous, elle promet un moment de bien-etre et de relaxation tout en renforçant la mobilite.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va preparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des epices.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Cest reparti pour une nouvelle semaine de competition. Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, les quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles dans latelier. Loccasion de jauger leur adversaire. Et le premier pretendant au titre d’as de la deco, le voici : Mickaël, 34 ans, scenographe et à la recherche dun emploi. Mais pas le temps de rever. La concurrence arrive avec Aurelie, 31 ans, professeur darts plastiques.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la discrète Valerie qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest elle. A 41 ans, cette Liegeoise est passionnee par le home staging ou lart de mettre une propriete en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un precepte que Valerie applique dailleurs dans son interieur.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: En ce troisième jour de competition, cest Aurelie qui debarque. Avec son joli minois et son look retro. Notre candidate est loin detre une novice. Professeur darts plastiques et etalagiste, elle en connaît un rayon en matière de deco. Avec ces doigts de fee, Aurelie cree de jolies choses, Meme si elle est du genre sûre delle. Notre prof prefère ne pas perdre la mesure avec le thème de la semaine « En avant la musique ! ».

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour clore cette semaine de competition, cest Pierre, liegeois de 37 ans qui entre dans la course. Depuis son plus jeune âge, ce jeune papa est un fan invetere de lunivers street art. Un style qui le suit partout depuis de très nombreuses annees. Et de cette passion a très vite decoule une philosophie artistique bien particulière.

programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Après quatre jours de competition acharnee, cest enfin le jour de la finale. Mais avant de decouvrir les notes de leurs proprietaires respectifs, chaque candidat aura loccasion de savoir ce que pensent ses adversaires de ses choix deco. Et cest Mickael qui ouvre le bal et qui rejoint notre experte en deco Valerie Damidot. Il est temps pour lui de decouvrir si ses camarades ont ete aussi stratèges que lui.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Revolve to Evolve: Twists, Balance and Hamstrings
programme.desc: A challenging and strengthening sequence, Revolve and Evolve seeks to reveal moments of relaxation in which truths can be more readily accessed. Use this sequence to detoxify, build confidence and restore a sense of balance and wellbeing to take off the mat and into the rest of your day.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training special haut du corps. Après un echauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, epaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. Le tout dans une ambiance fun et accessible, avec des conseils pour bien respirer et bouger sans se blesser. La coordination et la mobilite sont aussi au cœur de cette seance, ideale pour reveiller le haut du corps. Un moment sportif et motivant à vivre chez soi, à tout moment de la journee.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce quatrième jour de competition, cest Monica, la jolie Parisienne, qui entre en scène. Mais derrière ses airs de citadine, à 52 ans, elle est une adversaire redoutable, avec de nombreux atouts en poche. La decoration, cest une veritable passion pour notre doyenne de la semaine.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrenees Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte dAzur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While were all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va preparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des epices.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: To better understand the role of these explosive mountains located all over the world, on land or under the sea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes to Italy, the country with the most active volcanoes in Europe. Accompanied by volcano expert Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, the photographer meets those people who have chosen to live with « their » volcano, in spite of the dangers involved in this kind of proximity.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training special haut du corps. Après un echauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, epaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.desc: A challenging and strengthening sequence, Revolve and Evolve seeks to reveal moments of relaxation in which truths can be more readily accessed. programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Both pairs wowed the judges with their designs and planting in the previous round but now they take on their toughest challenge yet as they compete for the crown. They have to create show gardens at one of the World’s greatest gardens, RHS Wisley Gardens in Surrey, for a budget of £10,000. With a brief set by the gardens curator they’ll need to take their designs to the next level if their want to win, and they’ve only got 48 hours to complete them. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la discrète Valerie qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest elle. A 41 ans, cette Liegeoise est passionnee par le home staging ou lart de mettre une propriete en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un precepte que Valerie applique dailleurs dans son interieur.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week it’s the semi-finals and the competition hits a new level with our four remaining pairs all competing at the same time to create amazing gardens at the Glenfield Hospital in Leicester. Separated into 2 semi-finals, each with their own brief, the pressure increases as the plots get bigger and the budget goes up to £7500, whilst still only having 48 hours to complete them. In semi-final 1 Tamara and Kate take on husband and wife team Catherine and James Burrage where they’re challenge to create a garden for the staff of the hospital to use. While in semi-final 2 Scottish pair James and Stuart take on the youngest pair in the competition, recent graduates Millie and Max, as they’re challenged to create gardens for the hospital’s patients.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: En ce troisième jour de competition, cest Aurelie qui debarque. Avec son joli minois et son look retro. Notre candidate est loin detre une novice. Professeur darts plastiques et etalagiste, elle en connaît un rayon en matière de deco. Avec ces doigts de fee, Aurelie cree de jolies choses, Meme si elle est du genre sûre delle. Notre prof prefère ne pas perdre la mesure avec le thème de la semaine « En avant la musique ! ».

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week it’s the last of the heats and sees a pair of new kids on the block taking on a more experienced and established pair of garden designers. For Millie Souter from London and Max Parker-Smith from Surrey it’s a huge challenge as both of them have only recently graduated in garden design from the prestigious Inchbald Garden Design College so have limited experience of actually creating gardens. Making things even tougher, it’s also the first time the friends have worked together. Opposing them is Nicola Bailey Gibson and Viv Seccombe who bring years of experience designing and building private gardens and award-winning show gardens. The challenge our pairs face is to create amazing gardens for Focus Birmingham Day Care Centre which offers activities and support to people with severe visual and physical disabilities. And they have to do this is just 2 days and on a budget of £5000.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour clore cette semaine de competition, cest Pierre, liegeois de 37 ans qui entre dans la course. Depuis son plus jeune âge, ce jeune papa est un fan invetere de lunivers street art. Un style qui le suit partout depuis de très nombreuses annees. Et de cette passion a très vite decoule une philosophie artistique bien particulière.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Après quatre jours de competition acharnee, cest enfin le jour de la finale. Mais avant de decouvrir les notes de leurs proprietaires respectifs, chaque candidat aura loccasion de savoir ce que pensent ses adversaires de ses choix deco. Et cest Mickael qui ouvre le bal et qui rejoint notre experte en deco Valerie Damidot. Il est temps pour lui de decouvrir si ses camarades ont ete aussi stratèges que lui.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: National Geographics Bertie Gregory ser på bienes fantastiske verden og de utrolige hemmelighetene bak suksessen deres. Fra murerbienes geniale arkitektur til kjøttetende bier i Amazonasregnskogen, de utrolige evnene deres blir avdekket sammen med ny kunnskap om bienes intelligens. Gjennom en honningbies liv følger vi livet i den travle bikuben når søstrene hennes kjemper for å overleve vinteren.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Planetens varmeste habitater – ørkenene – er i ferd med å bli enda varmere, tørrere og større. Til tross for dette klarer en rekke dyr fortsatt å overleve under de vanskeligste forholdene, deriblant utspekulerte hyener, små mungoer og edderkopper som bor i sanden. Følg dem gjennom en dag i livet deres i ørkenen for å forstå hvordan de håndterer solens formidable kraft mens den blir sterkere for hvert minutt som går.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Glem gepardens fart og ørnens syn. Ryan Reynolds avslører de ekstremt bisarre superkreftene til verdens stusseligste dyr. Si hei til den usynlige glassfrosken, den uskadelige honninggrevlingen og pistolreken som har et utrolig talent. Den skyter bobler som er varmere enn solen.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Selv om de fleste dyreforeldre er kjent for å være veldig overbeskyttende, finner Ryan Reynolds noen absurde foreldrestrategier hos dyrerikets absolutt verste foreldre. Fra gjess som legger egg på toppen av en klippe, til koalamødre som forer barna med bæsj. Disse foreldrene oppdrar barna sine på en helt egen måte.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Glem blomster og bier. Ryan Reynolds avslører de underlige taktikkene underdogs bruker for å tiltrekke seg “den rette”. Fra kjærlighet ved første blikk til stornesede neseaper og gærne kalkun-wingmans, til forspill blant flygende hunder. Disse dyrene omskriver regelboken for rotete romanser i dyreriket.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Verdens høyeste fjell huser leoparder, kongeørn, snøgeiter, hvitkinngås og geladaer. Men bare de tøffeste dyrene kan overleve i ekstremværet og den tynne luften på toppene.fox.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Eksperter på å få ned noen av de største dyrene på planeten, bruker vi etterforskning for å utforske hva som gjør geparder til så effektive rovdyr. Gjennom et nytt perspektiv på taktikken som brukes av disse kunnskapsrike morderne, ser vi hvordan en ung gepardmor lærer sine tre unger jaktens hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Ungene har kommet, og man har fått et nytt styre. På slettene prøver June å hjelpe den blyge valpen med å få mer selvtillit. Ruby står imot invasjonen fra en annen præriehundfamilie.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Nå som næringsrik mat er mangelvare i Highlands, må Charlotte lære å kjempe tilbake mot bøllene for å overleve den harde, tørre sesongen. I Flatlands frykter June for den yngste valpen hennes når melken begynner å gå tom, og Hyde sliter med å spise fast føde.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi ser nærmere på overlevelsesevnene til noen av de sterkeste rovdyrene i verden – isbjørner. Følg livene til en mor som sliter med å skaffe mat til de to ungene sine og en ung hann som holder på å sulte ihjel. Vi ser på taktikken disse dyrene bruker for å spore opp, forfølge og angripe bytter som sel, hval og valross.

programme.title: Dødelige dyretaktikker
programme.desc: Møt noen av klodens farligste dyr. For å overleve bruker de skremmende strategier og effektive taktikker som bakholdsangrep, kamuflasje, labber og klør, gift og jakt i flokk med mer for å ta byttet. Det handler om å drepe eller bli drept.

programme.title: Predator v Prey

programme.title: Verdens farligste
programme.desc: Rovdyr med enorm appetitt, inkludert burmesisk tigerpyton, tigerhaien som sluker i seg sardinstimer, og de menneskeetende løvene i Tsavo.

programme.title: Verdens farligste
programme.desc: Geparden, stjernekikkerfisken som svelger bytte på en tidels sekund, og den svarte mambaen er blant dyrene som dreper raskest.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Eksperter på å få ned noen av de største dyrene på planeten, bruker vi etterforskning for å utforske hva som gjør geparder til så effektive rovdyr. Gjennom et nytt perspektiv på taktikken som brukes av disse kunnskapsrike morderne, ser vi hvordan en ung gepardmor lærer sine tre unger jaktens hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi er kjent som voldsomme drapsmaskiner, og bruker etterforskning for å undersøke hvordan løver jakter store byttedyr. Med et nytt perspektiv på måten disse ekspertrovdyrene forfølger, jager og dreper, ser vi på at en løvinne er avhengig av list for å mate sine nyfødte unger, mens en fryktløs stolthet prøver å ta ned en gigantisk afrikansk elefant.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Av alle de store katterovdyrene, skiller leopardene seg ut med sin eksepsjonelle drapsekspertise. Vi kommer tett på en hunnleopard, og avslører hvordan disse erfarne morderne bruker listighet, styrke og fysikk for å følge og fange alt fra impalaer og gnuer til steinbit og stork.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi er kjent som bakholdets mestere, og bruker rettsmedisinsk teknologi for å utforske hvordan nilkrokodiller har blitt eksperter på å jakte på trekkende flokker av gnuer og sebraer. Med et forbløffende nytt perspektiv på pasienten og presis taktikk de bruker for å sette opp drapet, ser vi på hvordan en snikende mannlig krokodille sikter mot sitt neste offer.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi ser nærmere på overlevelsesevnene til noen av de sterkeste rovdyrene i verden – isbjørner. Følg livene til en mor som sliter med å skaffe mat til de to ungene sine og en ung hann som holder på å sulte ihjel. Vi ser på taktikken disse dyrene bruker for å spore opp, forfølge og angripe bytter som sel, hval og valross.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Det er fullt kaos hos Pol Vet! Dyrlegen assisterer en ung hoppe som føder og dr. Lisa behandler en grand danois med et hovent ansikt. Geiter med koksidiose kjemper for livet og en løskatt vil ikke behandles. En katt er full av luft, en gris har mistet hengemagen. En svart labrador har et illeluktende problem. Bråkete angus-kveg får svangerskapskontroller og vinteren kommer til Michigan.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Når temperaturen faller, stiger antall tilfeller ved Pols veterinærklinikk. Dr. Lisa kjemper for å redde Pearls skadde bein, og senere kommer en hund inn med fødselskomplikasjoner. Flere griser og et marsvin får en sjekk, mens dr. Pol og dr. Brenda undersøker kyrne på en nærliggende melkegård.

programme.title: Død ved daggry
programme.desc: Etter solnedgang på øya Java kommer alt fra krypdyr til flygeagamer frem for å spise og slåss for å overleve i jungelen.
